_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: I have just the thing

sentences.en: First there's this one. Cool, huh?
Yeah, it might make it hard to strike a really romantic note.
sentences.ko: 어, 그걸 입고 로맨틱한 분위기를 내긴 좀 어렵겠는데.

sentences.en: ★ If it's romance we're looking for, I believe I have just the thing.
sentences.ko: ★ 로맨스가 목표라면, 딱 맞는 게 있지.
